mapper.insert:
SELECT SEQ_SCRIPTS.NEXTVAL FROM DUAL
INSERT INTO TBL_SCRIPTS (SCRIPT_ID, MY_BUILD_ID, OPP_BUILD_ID, RESULT, CONTENT) VALUES (#{scriptId}, #{myBuildId}, #{oppBuildId}, #{result}, #{content})

MERGE INTO TBL_SCRIPTS t USING (SELECT #{myBuildId} AS MY_BUILD_ID, #{oppBuildId} AS OPP_BUILD_ID, #{result} AS RESULT FROM DUAL) s ON (t.MY_BUILD_ID = s.MY_BUILD_ID AND t.OPP_BUILD_ID = s.OPP_BUILD_ID AND t.RESULT = s.RESULT) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.CONTENT = #{content} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (SCRIPT_ID, MY_BUILD_ID, OPP_BUILD_ID, RESULT, CONTENT) VALUES (SEQ_SCRIPTS.NEXTVAL, #{myBuildId}, #{oppBuildId}, #{result}, #{content})
mapper.select: SELECT s.SCRIPT_ID, s.MY_BUILD_ID, s.OPP_BUILD_ID, s.RESULT, s.CONTENT, s.CREATED_AT, mb.BUILD_NAME AS MY_BUILD_NAME, ob.BUILD_NAME AS OPP_BUILD_NAME FROM TBL_SCRIPTS s JOIN TBL_BUILDS mb ON s.MY_BUILD_ID = mb.BUILD_ID JOIN TBL_BUILDS ob ON s.OPP_BUILD_ID = ob.BUILD_ID WHERE s.MY_BUILD_ID = #{myBuildId} ORDER BY ob.BUILD_ID, s.RESULT
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_BUILD_MATCHUP t USING (SELECT #{buildId} AS BUILD_ID, #{vsRace} AS VS_RACE FROM DUAL) s ON (t.BUILD_ID = s.BUILD_ID AND t.VS_RACE = s.VS_RACE) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.MATCHUP = #{matchup} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (MATCHUP_ID, BUILD_ID, VS_RACE, MATCHUP) VALUES (SEQ_BUILD_MATCHUP.NEXTVAL, #{buildId}, #{vsRace}, #{matchup})
mapper.select: SELECT MATCHUP_ID, BUILD_ID, VS_RACE, MATCHUP FROM TBL_BUILD_MATCHUP WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId} ORDER BY VS_RACE
mapper.insert: MERGE INTO TBL_BUILD_STAT_BONUS t USING (SELECT #{buildId} AS BUILD_ID, #{statName} AS STAT_NAME FROM DUAL) s ON (t.BUILD_ID = s.BUILD_ID AND t.STAT_NAME = s.STAT_NAME) WHEN MATCHED THEN UPDATE SET t.BONUS_MULT = #{bonusMult} WHEN NOT MATCHED THEN INSERT (BONUS_ID, BUILD_ID, STAT_NAME, BONUS_MULT) VALUES (SEQ_BUILD_STAT_BONUS.NEXTVAL, #{buildId}, #{statName}, #{bonusMult})
mapper.select: SELECT BONUS_ID, BUILD_ID, STAT_NAME, BONUS_MULT FROM TBL_BUILD_STAT_BONUS WHERE BUILD_ID = #{buildId}
